title: sideritis pauli subsp. calduchii
intro: Sideritis pauli subsp. calduchii, also known as Calduch's mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis pauli plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sideritis pauli subsp. calduchii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed to support overall health and well-being.
